How to Cite AAA

Citation guidance for users of the Artificial Algae Algorithm.

When using AAA in research, please cite the original canonical publication. Verify the final authorship, venue, volume, pages, and DOI against the official publication record.

APA

Uymaz, S. A. (YYYY). Artificial Algae Algorithm (AAA): A novel metaheuristic algorithm for global optimization. Journal name.

IEEE

S. A. Uymaz, "Artificial Algae Algorithm (AAA): A Novel Metaheuristic Algorithm for Global Optimization," Journal name, YYYY.

BibTeX

@article{uymaz_aaa,
  author  = {Uymaz, Sait Ali},
  title   = {Artificial Algae Algorithm (AAA): A Novel Metaheuristic Algorithm for Global Optimization},
  year    = {YYYY},
  journal = {Journal name},
  note    = {Replace this placeholder with canonical metadata}
}

These templates are ready to copy once canonical publication metadata replaces the placeholders.
